$comment: phase 4.7 snapshot — UC-RW-018 Follow ( uniqueness check + AP-RW-004 self-check 늦음).
sql_id: ProfileService.follow (logical SELECT user x2 + SELECT follows + INSERT follows)

scenarios.name: happy path — 신규 follow 관계
scenarios.when: userRepository.findOne(username='bob') + userRepository.findOne(email='alice') → self-check 통과 → followsRepository.findOne(follower+following) null → save

scenarios.name: edge — self-follow 차단 ( AP-RW-004 늦은 검증)
scenarios.when: userRepository.findOne x2 ( DB call 후 self-check) → followingUser.email === followerEmail → HttpException(BAD_REQUEST)

then._note: AP-RW-004 — self-check 가 DB call 후 → 불필요한 DB 호출 / 모범 = controller 레벨 validation

intent_classification.note: self-check 늦은 검증 / 효과 미세 / D2.5 결단 ambiguous 유지

behavior_likely_bug: DB call 후 self-check = 불필요한 DB 호출 (성능 minor)
